context:
NITROGEN INTEL
==============
📌Nitrogen Ransomware became active in October 2024
📌Appends the extension .nba after encryption
📌Targeted: 🇺🇸 🇨🇦 🇮🇹 🇩🇪 🇫🇷 🇵🇹
📌Industries: Manufacturing, Construction, Retail, Banking, Hospitality, Service, Gaming
📌Published 47 Victims (May 2026)
💡Sample files are uploaded to MEGA and URLs are passed to client on their Chat Panel
💡Standard Ransom Demand: €200.000
💡Claims to perform DDoS Attack if not paid
💡Dedicated Leak Onion Domains for each victim
💡Upon the Code-Scan, there is a 39.4% code match with AwfulRobber Ransomware with 15.76% Code Match with Cactus Ransomware
💡Just like Lockbit, they themself call "NitrogenSupp" on Twitter
💡The new sample observed in late May 2025; is found that the creation time has been tampered to 19th June 1992; which is a Modus Operandi of VanHelsing Ransomware Group and J Ransomware Group
💡Found first Linux file on 27th May 2025
💡In May 2026, they updated a message on their DLS "IMPORTANT: All links we provide in the READ_ME_TXT file are unique for each company. A general link to our TOX support is available on our blog. If you contact anyone through other links, you are responsible for the consequences."
💡Observed low activity in late 2025 and early 2026
